text: I feel curiosity simmering in me as I transition from a quiet, orderly meeting room to a vibrant, informative exhibit space. The play of glass and light in the meeting area gives way to the electric energy of the R+D wall, filled with purposeful words and interactive displays. Here, the spirit of innovation is palpable, and I feel drawn into the pulse of inquiry and creative thought. I am eager to reflect on the relationship between structured environments and spaces that provoke the imagination.
